title: Generated Prompt Bundle Topology Plan
description: Validates the topology plan for a generated prompt bundle. The topology plan explains which internal folders and module families the meta-bundle selected, which are universal, which are conditional, and why any non-universal folders were created.

bundle_id.description: Kebab-case identifier of the generated bundle.

bundle_version.description: Semantic version of the generated bundle.

target_bundle_class.description: High-level class used to select the internal topology.

topology_policy_version.description: Version of the topology policy that governed folder creation.

risk_profile.description: Risk level of the target bundle. May influence folders such as policies/.

domain_specificity.description: How domain-specific the target bundle is.

requested_module_families.description: Module families explicitly requested by the target bundle brief.

universal_folders.description: Folders that must exist in every generated bundle.

allowed_conditional_folders.description: Folders the meta-bundle is allowed to create if the topology policy is satisfied.

creation_conditions.description: Human-readable conditions under which this folder may be created.

prohibited_folder_names.description: Folder names that must never appear in generated bundles.

resolved_topology.description: The final set of folders selected for the generated bundle.

folder_justifications.description: Justifications for every non-universal folder that appears in the resolved topology.

evidence.description: Short statements showing which policy conditions or brief requirements justified the folder.

module_family_map.description: Maps each folder in the resolved topology to the module families expected inside it.

notes.description: Optional explanatory notes for human reviewers.

folderName.description: Kebab-case folder name without a trailing slash.

allOf.description: Resolved topology may not contain prohibited names.
